settings.colorPicker.title: Choose color
login.newPasswordRequirements:
The new password must:
- be at least 10 characters long
- contain at least one uppercase letter
- contain at least one lowercase letter
- contain at least one number
- contain at least one special character
- not match the old password
login.noConnectionHint:
No connection to "{url}". Please check your internet connection.
If you selected "{otherSchool}", you must enter a valid address.
login.userTypeUnsupported.title: Sorry!
login.userTypeUnsupported.message: This app is only suitable for students and parents.

offline.body: A connection to the digital register cannot currently be established.
